description: Two marker cells define upper and lower colored regions. Each color is expanded into a rectangular frame-like band across the grid.
arcDslCode:
from dsl import *
from constants import *


def solve_1bfc4729(I):
    x1 = asindices(I)
    x2 = tophalf(I)
    x3 = bottomhalf(I)
    x4 = leastcolor(x2)
    x5 = leastcolor(x3)
    x6 = hfrontier(TWO_BY_ZERO)
    x7 = box(x1)
    x8 = combine(x6, x7)
    x9 = fill(x2, x4, x8)
    x10 = hmirror(x9)
    x11 = replace(x10, x4, x5)
    O = vconcat(x9, x11)
    return O
